LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PATRICIA SMITH'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. PARAGRAPHS 9, 25, 33 AND 34 PLEAD THAT SMITH WRONGFULLY DETAINED THE PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES A COMMUNITY PROPERTY INTEREST, MEANING THAT THE PROBATE COURTS DOES NOT HAVE EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION.
